heading: Use of field work funds for employment of men with equipment, etc.
label: 2237 Use of field work funds for employment of men with equipment, etc.
text: Funds available for field work in the Department of Agriculture shall be available for employment by contract or otherwise of men with equipment, boats, work animals, animal-drawn, and motor-propelled vehicles.
notes: CodificationSection was formerly classified to prior to the general revision and enactment of Title 5, Government Organization and Employees, by , , .section 542a of Title 5Pub. L. 89–554, § 180 Stat. 378Sept. 6, 1966
